name: Case Study Example
history: Recurrent dreams during graduate school about being unprepared for a thesis defense. Father described as having high expectations.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't meet expectations, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough, and I will never succeed.
coping_strategies: Over-preparing and seeking approval from authority figures.
situation: Receiving criticism during a work performance review.
auto_thought: I am going to fail, and they will see how incompetent I am.
